nasb.text: He overlaid the main room with cypress wood and overlaid it with fine gold, and ornamented it with palm trees and chains.

esv.text: The nave he lined with cypress and covered it with fine gold and made palms and chains on it.

cnv.text: 大殿的牆都蓋上松木，又貼上精金，又在上面刻上棕樹和鍊子。

ccb.text: 大殿里镶上松木板，贴上纯金，又刻上棕树和链子。
